message:
refactor: apply clippy match-guard, mul_add, and format-macro lints

Collapse nested match-arm-then-if patterns into idiomatic match guards
across agent, session, TUI, bedrock provider, SSE parser, and test
code. Replace manual a*b+c with f64::mul_add for floating-point
precision in extension scoring, CUSUM, conformal, and KL-divergence
math. Clean up trailing commas in format!/eprintln! macros, remove
redundant .into_iter(), and prefer if-let over match-with-empty-Err.

Also skip assistant messages carrying error_message during session
replay to prevent stale error noise in restored conversations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -585,7 +585,7 @@ impl<'a> PreflightAnalyzer<'a> {
                     findings.push(PreflightFinding {
                         severity,
                         category: FindingCategory::ModuleCompat,
-                        message: format!("Module `{specifier}` is {support}",),
+                        message: format!("Module `{specifier}` is {support}"),
                         remediation,
                         file: None,
                         line: lines.first().copied(),
